objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=10)
- adx(period=16)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 25
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 25
exit:
- condition: close crosses donchian.middle or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.0
tp_atr_mult: 3.0
description: ATR stop-loss (1.0x) and take-profit (3.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.
